name: copilot:monitor
description: Babysitter controller is enabled for this PR.

name: copilot:review-pending
description: Waiting for Copilot review on the current HEAD.

name: copilot:feedback
description: Current HEAD has actionable review comments to address.

name: copilot:clean
description: Latest Copilot review on the current HEAD reported no comments.

name: copilot:needs-human
description: Model or deterministic guards found an unsafe/ambiguous state.

name: copilot:loop-exhausted
description: Copilot review/fix iteration budget exhausted for the current HEAD.
